working_on: Routine task P5-04a: Ethics metaethics+normative seed — sixth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; pre-split a-half (P5-04b is the applied-ethics b-half) per phase_5.md T1-B with depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050. Author 0020_seed_ethics_part1.sql with ~26-30 ethics nodes covering the metaethics layer (moral realism, anti-realism / error theory, expressivism, naturalism vs non-naturalism, moral epistemology, motivational internalism vs externalism, the is-ought distinction, the open-question argument) and the normative-theory layer (consequentialism with utilitarianism canonical, deontology with Kantian categorical-imperative anchor, virtue ethics with Aristotelian eudaimonia anchor, contractualism Rawls/Scanlon, ethical egoism, divine command, particularism). Within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges only (~32-40); cross-domain bridges to deontic_logic, free_will, moral_responsibility, knowledge, belief deferred to P5-11. Apply via Supabase MCP; verify with engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0020_seed_ethics_part1.sql with ~26-30 nodes across the metaethics layer (~10-12: morality umbrella, moral realism, moral anti-realism, expressivism / non-cognitivism, error theory, moral naturalism, moral non-naturalism, moral epistemology, motivational internalism, motivational externalism, is-ought distinction, open-question argument) and the normative-theory layer (~14-17: normative ethics umbrella, consequentialism, utilitarianism, deontology, kantian ethics, categorical imperative, virtue ethics, eudaimonia, practical wisdom, contractualism, social contract theory, divine command theory, ethical egoism, moral particularism, supererogation, hedonism). Plus ~32-40 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges (umbrella → theses; theses → derivative positions; metaethics → normative bridge edges where pedagogically required). Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply migration via Supabase MCP apply_migration. Run engine/tools/validate.py with venv Python so the live graph audit engages. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED (mirrors P5-01a/P5-01b/P5-02a/P5-02b/P5-03; well above 70% INTERPRETED floor per phase_5.md T2-B). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in v1 registry). Cross-domain edges (deontic_logic↔deontology; free_will↔moral_responsibility↔ethics; knowledge↔moral_epistemology) deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. Sub-range slots 0021-0025 left reserved (granularity principle achieved within 0020). Two-commit pattern per S-0053/S-0054/S-0056/S-0057 procedural finding: deliverable commit (migration + ROUTING.md) split from auto_target.json status-flip commit so the staged scope-check engages on deliverables under in_progress task. End state: P5-04a complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-04a passes both criteria. graph_version 6→7. phase: P_5
outcome_summary: Phase 5 ethics metaethics+normative seed (P5-04a) lands at S-0058. 28 nodes + 34 edges across two layers: foundation umbrella morality (1); metaethics (12) covering moral_realism, moral_anti_realism, error_theory (Mackie 1977 queerness + relativity), expressivism (Ayer/Stevenson/Hare/Blackburn/Gibbard; Frege-Geach), moral_naturalism (Cornell — Boyd/Brink/Sturgeon), moral_non_naturalism (Moore 1903 / Parfit 2011), open_question_argument, moral_epistemology, motivational_internalism, motivational_externalism (Brink 1989), is_ought_distinction (Hume 1739); normative theory (15) covering consequentialism (Williams 1973 integrity), utilitarianism (Bentham/Mill; act-vs-rule), hedonism (Nozick experience machine; Mill higher pleasures), deontology (Ross 1930 prima facie duties; agent-centered restrictions/options), kantian_ethics, categorical_imperative (3 formulations; Korsgaard 1996 unification), virtue_ethics (Anscombe 1958 / MacIntyre 1981 / Hursthouse 1999 revival), eudaimonia (Aristotle's ergon argument), practical_wisdom (phronesis), contractualism (Scanlon 1998; aggregation problem), divine_command_theory (Euthyphro dilemma; modified DCT), ethical_egoism (Parfit 1984 self-defeating), moral_particularism (Dancy 1993/2004 holism), supererogation (the structural concept testing normative theories — demandingness objection to consequentialism). 5-tier layered DAG; 28/28 INTERPRETED (mirrors prior P5 sessions); within-domain edges only. graph_version 6→7. Migration applied via chunked execute_sql (UPDATE settings; INSERT 13 nodes; INSERT 15 nodes; INSERT 34 edges) + apply_migration marker call (no-op SELECT 1 body) recording the migration name in supabase_migrations.schema_migrations — body too large for single-call apply_migration. SQL escape bug fixed pre-apply (Mackie's → Mackie''s in is_ought_distinction.teaching_notes). Live verification 160/206. check_target.py P5-04a both criteria PASS; validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 156 soft-warns (153 missing_rigor_score expected; 2 issue_collision upstream; 1 routine_issue_spam from prior sessions today not this one). Two-commit pattern continued. 0 in-band Issues filed; 0 HANDOFF entries. Sub-range slots 0021-0025 left reserved. Forward state: P5-04a complete, P5-04b (Ethics applied) now eligible — its depends_on [P5-01a, P5-04a] is satisfied. Phase 5 progress: 6/16 tasks complete; 6 routine sessions consumed of 18 max_sessions per phase_5.md T1-C. Apply-mechanics finding (chunked-execute_sql + apply_migration-marker pattern) named in STATE.md Next session work item for future seed sessions when migration body exceeds the single-call payload comfortable limit.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes. Declared scope was ~26-30 nodes / ~32-40 edges across the metaethics + normative-theory layers; delivered 28 nodes and 34 edges, both inside the declared range and matching the cluster decomposition (1 foundation + 12 metaethics + 15 normative-theory). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite used; already in registry); ROUTING.md per-session narrative appended. Migration applied to paideia-dev via chunked execute_sql + apply_migration marker (whole-body apply_migration was infeasible due to MCP call payload size); final live count 160 nodes / 206 edges (delta +28/+34 matches the migration). graph_version 6→7 honored. confidence_level distribution 28/28 INTERPRETED matches phase_5.md T2-B 70% floor with margin. Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1. SQL escape bug in is_ought_distinction.teaching_notes (Mackie's → Mackie''s) caught pre-apply via awk-grep sweep across non-comment lines; no apply attempted with the broken text. check_target.py --task-id P5-04a passes both criteria. validate.py 30 checks 0 hard-fails 156 soft-warns (153 missing_rigor_score expected per phase_5.md T2-C partial-seed shape; 2 issue_collision upstream MemPalace #1/#2; 1 routine_issue_spam from prior routine sessions today, not this session — P5-04a created 0 GitHub issues). Two-commit pattern continued (deliverable + close) per S-0053/S-0054/S-0056/S-0057 finding. Sub-range slots 0021-0025 left reserved.

commits.summary: eager-claim S-0058 — routine task P5-04a Ethics metaethics+normative seed
